privileged_info_summary: The task exports a hospital ER diagram (hospital_er_base.drawio) to PNG format. The source diagram is a synthetic test file containing Patient, Doctor, and Appointment database entities with relationships. The exported file must be named hospital_er_export.png and saved to /home/ga/Desktop with a minimum size of 5 KB. The environment uses draw.io Desktop version 26.0.9 with automated file opening via xdotool. All metadata claims regarding filename, location, source diagram, file size requirements, and format are accurate.
